name: cooldown
description: Get notified when your AI coding agent is ready again.

scripts.test: npm run build && node dist/cli.js __selftest && d=$(mktemp -d) && COOLDOWN_DIR=$d node dist/cli.js update pi --reset "1 Jul 2026 1.10" --usage 94 && COOLDOWN_DIR=$d node dist/cli.js update pi --reset "1 Jul 2026 1.10" --usage 89 && test "$(COOLDOWN_DIR=$d node dist/cli.js status | grep -c '^pi')" = 1 && COOLDOWN_DIR=$d node dist/cli.js daemon install --dry-run
